subject: Paras, a small orange crab-like Pokemon with two large red-capped mushrooms growing from its back, set against a warm autumn-toned organic background
description: A small crustacean creature with an orange segmented body, crab-like claws, and prominent bug eyes. Two rounded red-capped mushrooms sprout from its back, dominating the upper portion of the frame and nearly matching the creature's own body size. The background is warm orange and red-brown, suggesting autumn foliage or fallen leaves. The creature is oriented roughly forward-left, claws slightly raised. The mushrooms are the defining visual element of the composition.
foreground: Small orange crab creature with two large red-capped mushrooms growing from its back
background: Warm orange-red organic background suggesting autumn leaves or foliage
emotion: alert, defensive — claws slightly raised, eyes wide
